calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2008 Continued To Feb-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Dec-18-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Nichole Rodich, #11332.

Robert L. Shepard, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Elizabeth Totten, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Elisa Uy Calica.
Amended Default was entered against defendant on October 8, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 17, 2008.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Copy of Promissory Note in the amount of $25,000.00----------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Copy of Promissory Note in the amount of $9,500.00-----------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Copy of Promissory Note in the amount of $3,000.00-----------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4---Handwritten document signed by defendant re: payments
to plaintiff in the amounts of $5,000, $10,000 & $2,000------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Elizabeth Totten, and against the Defaulted Defendant Elisa Uy Calica as follows:

Damages/Principal - $43,400.00.
Costs - $394.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $43,794.50.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
